# Licensed ASR gate fixture

`2086-149220-0033.wav` is a LibriSpeech sample used for the Phase 4 private
GB10 inference gate. LibriSpeech is distributed under CC BY 4.0. The immutable
source URL, SHA-256 digest, and golden transcript live in
`server/model-pools.lock.json`.

Source corpus and license: https://www.openslr.org/12
